content: Hi. Would like someone to assess the best team for my account. Thank you in advance

Played through chapter 1 of arc 2, and I'm getting stressed with the difficulty. Skill issue ik

Could I make a safe comp? where i just won't take too much dmg <:dead:1356082627509092372> 

Willing to invest + pull for anyone if need be <:please:1356053110375714817> 

current box:
gelot thais aigis horla should be able to go through the whole story no problem

Hello There
So I have been using Caecus, Winkle, Jenkin and Casiah
This team has been mostly good, can survive and dish out counter because of caecus and winkle, really like the burst dmg jenkin does especially when I have a extra turn due to ultra space with his burst card in ultra space and Casiah is very situational
But some times this teams feels clunky

I have gone through the new player guide but would like to get others opinions

Now seeing my characters and inventory
What teams can I make and among those what should I be using because my plan is to complete ch4 before horla's banner goes away on 28th, i am hoping to spend less silver on horla because I also want to try for vort
get e2 thais
fixes all problem
Hmm i can get a second proto thing to get her to e2 after 5 days
this fixes all problems
E0 Thais and her wod decent stopping point since you have 2 characters you want to aim for

What about teams?
Any opinions there?

Currently you don't have much in terms of carries but for now

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
